'''ngarate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:babyishly|babyishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:babyishly|babyishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngarate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngarate|ngarate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngaratesher|ngaratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngaratesherĂ«m|ngaratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngaratero|ngaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngarateshĂ«|ngarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngarateshĂ«m|ngarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingaratero|gokingaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingarateshĂ«|gokingarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingarateshĂ«m|gokingarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongarankerom|gongarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongarankeshĂ«|gongarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongarankeshĂ«m|gongarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongarankeya|gongarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngaraterom|ngaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngaratemu|ngaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngarateya|ngarateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingaraterom|gokingaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingaratemu|gokingaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingarateya|gokingarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngararate|ngararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngararatesher|ngararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngararatesherĂ«m|ngararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngararatero|ngararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngararateshĂ«|ngararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngararateshĂ«m|ngararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingararatero|gokingararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingararateshĂ«|gokingararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingararateshĂ«m|gokingararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongararankerom|gongararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongararankeshĂ«|gongararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongararankeshĂ«m|gongararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongararankeya|gongararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngararaterom|ngararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngararatemu|ngararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngararateya|ngararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingararaterom|gokingararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingararatemu|gokingararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingararateya|gokingararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠrĂŠte|ngĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠrĂŠtesher|ngĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠrĂŠtero|ngĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠrĂŠtero|gokingĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠrĂŠterom|ngĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠrĂŠtemu|ngĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠrĂŠteya|ngĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠrĂŠterom|gokingĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠrĂŠteya|gokingĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafrafte|ngafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafraftesher|ngafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafraftesherĂ«m|ngafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafraftero|ngafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafrafteshĂ«|ngafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafrafteshĂ«m|ngafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafraftero|gokingafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafrafteshĂ«|gokingafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafrafteshĂ«m|gokingafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafrafnkerom|gongafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafrafnkeshĂ«|gongafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafrafnkeshĂ«m|gongafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafrafnkeya|gongafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafrafterom|ngafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafraftemu|ngafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafrafteya|ngafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafrafterom|gokingafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafraftemu|gokingafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafrafteya|gokingafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
